Title: Distinct types of short open reading frames are translated in plant cells

Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Overexpression caused longer caulonema cells and rapid growth/earlier aging; knockout caused a small but significant growth reduction under some conditions.
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Mass spectrometry confirmation of translation; overexpression; CRISPR/Cas9 knockout; morphological and growth-rate phenotyping
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. PSEP1 is a 41-aa lncRNA-encoded peptide translated in moss. 2. Overexpression increased caulonema cell length and promoted rapid protonemal growth. 3. Knockout caused a modest growth defect under certain culture conditions, indicating a role in growth and development.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Growth on BCD medium with 0.5% glucose; solid media and liquid culture without glucose
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Detected in gametophores, protonemata, and protoplasts
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Detected in gametophores, protonemata, and protoplasts
Common_Genes.Applied_Promoters: Overexpression construct in pPLV27 vector; promoter not explicitly stated
Common_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Overexpression caused earlier aging and cell death
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Named Physcomitrella patens sORF encoded peptide 1 (PSEP1); encoded by an lncRNA-sORF.

Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Knockout decreased growth rate and altered filament branching; overexpression also decreased growth and caused browning of protonemal tissue under some conditions.
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Mass spectrometry confirmation of translation; overexpression; CRISPR/Cas9 knockout; morphological and growth-rate phenotyping
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. PSEP3 is a 57-aa conserved lncRNA-encoded peptide. 2. Loss of function reduced growth and altered protonemal branching. 3. Overexpression also reduced growth and caused tissue browning under ammonium-tartrate-free conditions, indicating dosage-sensitive developmental regulation.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: BCD medium; medium without glucose and ammonium tartrate; medium without ammonium tartrate
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Translation confirmed by unique peptides; specific tissue pattern not fully detailed in text
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Translation confirmed by unique peptides; specific tissue pattern not fully detailed in text
Common_Genes.Applied_Promoters: Overexpression construct in pPLV27 vector; promoter not explicitly stated
Common_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Overexpression caused strong growth inhibition and browning
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Referred to as psep3 in knockout and PSEP3 in overexpression analyses.

Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Knockout decreased growth rate, altered protonemal architecture, and increased leafy shoot number under some conditions; overexpression slightly decreased growth rate and increased leafy shoot number under ammonium-tartrate-free conditions.
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Mass spectrometry confirmation of translation; overexpression; CRISPR/Cas9 knockout; morphological and growth-rate phenotyping
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. PSEP25 is a 61-aa conserved lncRNA-encoded peptide translated in all three moss cell types. 2. Knockout reduced growth and altered protonemal architecture. 3. Both knockout and overexpression affected gametophore/leafy shoot formation in a condition-dependent manner.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: BCDAT medium; medium without glucose but with ammonium tartrate; BCD medium without ammonium tartrate
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Common to gametophores, protonemata, and protoplasts
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Common to gametophores, protonemata, and protoplasts
Common_Genes.Applied_Promoters: Overexpression construct in pPLV27 vector; promoter not explicitly stated
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: One of three lncRNA-sORF peptides detected in all three cell types by multiple unique endogenous peptides.

Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Knockout caused a slight decrease in plant diameter, with one line showing significant growth reduction; overexpression significantly decreased growth rate.
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Mass spectrometry confirmation of translation; overexpression; CRISPR/Cas9 knockout; morphological and growth-rate phenotyping
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. PSEP18 is a 40-aa lncRNA-encoded peptide translated in all three moss cell types. 2. Overexpression reduced moss growth rate. 3. Knockout had mild effects overall, although one start-codon deletion line showed significant growth reduction.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: BCD medium with 0.5% glucose; medium with glucose and without ammonium tartrate
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Common to gametophores, protonemata, and protoplasts
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Common to gametophores, protonemata, and protoplasts
Common_Genes.Applied_Promoters: Overexpression construct in pPLV27 vector; promoter not explicitly stated
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Phenotype interpretation complicated because one knockout deleted the start codon and authors note possible relevance of nonsense-mediated decay.
